title: Crispy Vietnamese Chicken Noodles
description: A kid-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring crispy chicken and noodles in a savory mustardy sauce, served in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the mustard, soy sauce, and honey to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the rice noodles to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Serve the crispy chicken and noodles in a Korean brass bowl.
Garnish with sliced green onions and serve immediately.
